examples: And we-we still have to vanquish his shadow, too.
The best way to vanquish your enemies on the Internet?
So we will weep together to care each other to vanquish our pain.
Aston Martin has unveiled the latest addition to its lineup, a 6-liter V12 coupe called the Vanquish.
For a grand touring car, the Vanquish can get downright flinty in the suspension (the 20-inch, no-profile Pirellis don't help).
